Title: OpenSearch Security plugin: DLS not applied on documents linked by has_child or has_parent relation
Description: A flaw was identified in the OpenSearch Security plugin's document-level security (DLS) implementation. DLS restrictions were not correctly applied to search queries that use has_parent or has_child join relations. This could allow an authenticated user to access document contents that should have been restricted by DLS rules.
AffectedVersions: All versions starting from 1.0.0 before 2.19.4, all versions starting from 3.0.0 before 3.2.0
NotImpacted: All versions before 1.0.0, all versions starting from 2.19.4 before 3.0.0, all versions starting from 3.2.0
